summary: Iteration 78: Shopify Store Connection Bug Fix VERIFIED. All three root causes (OAuth form replaced with Admin API token form, fetch bodyUsed bug workaround with HTTP 200 responses, CSRF token now sent) are fixed and working.

issues: Mixed content warning: HTTP notification requests blocked on HTTPS page - pre-existing issue, not related to current fix

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/connections/store with platform=shopify and invalid access_token returns HTTP 200 with success=false and descriptive error 'Store not found'
BACKEND: POST /api/connections/store with platform=shopify but no access_token returns HTTP 200 with success=false and 'Admin API access token is required'
BACKEND: POST /api/connections/store with non-existent store domain returns descriptive error with code=NOT_FOUND
BACKEND: GET /api/connections/platforms shows Shopify needs store_url and access_token fields (NOT api_key/api_secret)
BACKEND: GET /api/connections/ returns stores and ads arrays correctly
FRONTEND: Shopify card shows store domain input with placeholder 'your-store.myshopify.com'
FRONTEND: Shopify card shows Admin API access token input (NOT OAuth client_id/secret)
FRONTEND: Setup instructions visible: 'Settings > Apps > Develop apps > Create app > Configure Admin API scopes > Install'
FRONTEND: Clicking 'Connect Shopify Store' with fake credentials shows inline error in red
FRONTEND: Error message is SPECIFIC: 'Store fake-store-xyz123.myshopify.com not found. Please check your store domain.'
FRONTEND: Error is NOT a generic 'Failed to connect' message
FRONTEND: Dashboard loads correctly after testing (no regression)

verified_features.feature: Shopify Admin API Token Flow (replaces OAuth)
verified_features.verification: Frontend shows domain + access_token inputs. Backend verifies token by calling Shopify Admin API (GET shop.json)

verified_features.feature: HTTP 200 with success=false for validation errors
verified_features.verification: Backend returns JSONResponse with success=false for invalid/missing token and unreachable stores. This works around fetch API bodyUsed bug with 4xx responses.
Errors include specific codes (AUTH_FAILED, NOT_FOUND, UNREACHABLE, VALIDATION) and human-readable messages mentioning store domain

verified_features.feature: CSRF token sent in API requests
verified_features.verification: getCsrfToken() reads __Host-csrf cookie, getAuthHeaders() includes x-csrf-token header. handleShopifyConnect uses api.post() which includes CSRF token.
shopifyError state displayed in red div with data-testid='shopify-error'. Error extracted from response.data.error.message

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopify connection bug fix fully verified. Key changes: (1) Frontend Shopify form now asks for store domain + Admin API access token instead of OAuth client_id/secret, (2) Backend returns HTTP 200 with success=false for validation errors to work around fetch API bodyUsed bug, (3) Frontend api.js sends x-csrf-token header in all requests. Error messages are specific (e.g., 'Store not found', 'Invalid access token') not generic. Mixed content warning for notifications is a pre-existing unrelated issue.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: Shopify store connection was failing silently - users clicked connect and nothing happened
root_causes: 1. Frontend Shopify form was asking for OAuth Client ID/Secret, but regular Shopify users use Admin API access tokens (not OAuth)
2. Backend returned 4xx HTTP status codes for validation errors, but fetch API has a bodyUsed bug where 4xx response bodies can't be read reliably
3. CSRF middleware was blocking POST requests because frontend wasn't sending x-csrf-token header
fix_applied: 1. PlatformConnectionsPage.jsx: Shopify card now has domain input + access_token input (lines 281-319)
2. connections.py: Returns HTTP 200 with success=false and error object for validation errors (lines 154-175)
3. api.js: getCsrfToken() reads __Host-csrf cookie, getAuthHeaders() includes x-csrf-token (lines 38-57)
reproduction_steps: 6. Before fix: Nothing happened (CSRF blocked + error body unreadable)
7. After fix: Shows red error 'Store not found. Please check your store domain.'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested full flow - error message 'Store fake-store-xyz123.myshopify.com not found. Please check your store domain.' now displays inline in red
